message:
test: add test infrastructure and CLI integration tests

Add the test framework structure for the ms CLI with integration
test scaffolding and fixture directories.

tests/cli.rs:
- CLI integration test module
- Command execution helpers
- Output parsing utilities for robot mode
- Test fixtures for skill files
- Temporary directory management for isolation

tests/fixtures/:
- Directory for test skill files
- Sample skill markdown with various disclosure levels
- Configuration file examples for testing
- Bundle manifests for packaging tests

tests/integration/:
- Directory for integration test suites
- End-to-end workflow testing
- Database state verification
- Search result validation

Test patterns:
- Each command has corresponding integration tests
- Robot mode output validated as JSON
- Human mode output checked for expected strings
- Error cases tested for proper exit codes
- Concurrent operation safety verification

Test execution:
- cargo test: Run unit and integration tests
- cargo test --test cli: Run CLI integration tests only
- ms test: Run skill-defined test cases

Uses criterion for performance benchmarks (benches/search_perf.rs)
to track search latency and indexing throughput.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
